# appStep

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for AppStep records via csdk CLI

## Usage

```bash
csdk app-step list
csdk app-step get --id <value>
csdk app-step create --name <value> [--actorId <value>] [--count <value>]
csdk app-step update --id <value> [--actorId <value>] [--name <value>] [--count <value>]
csdk app-step delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all appStep records

```bash
csdk app-step list
```

### Create a appStep

```bash
csdk app-step create --name <value> [--actorId <value>] [--count <value>]
```

### Get a appStep by id

```bash
csdk app-step get --id <value>
```
